term: I am so going to marry that guy
pronunciation: /aɪ æm soʊ ˈɡoʊɪŋ tə ˈmæri ðæt ɡaɪ/
englishDefinitions: A very emphatic way of saying that you strongly want to marry a particular man.
Used informally to express strong admiration or determination about someone.
persianTranslation: من حتماً می‌خوام با اون مرد ازدواج کنم
من قطعاً با اون پسره ازدواج می‌کنم
examples: He made dinner and cleaned the kitchen—I'm so going to marry that guy.
After seeing how kind he is, she said, “I am so going to marry that guy.”
You met someone perfect? Wow, you’re so going to marry that guy.
synonyms: I'm going to marry that guy
I really want to marry him
